parentQuestion: Which part of the cerebral cortex is involved in intellect, cognition, recall, a...

scaffolds.q: Different parts of the cerebral cortex have different functions.
scaffolds.explain: The cerebral cortex is organized into specialized regions — motor areas control movement, sensory areas process input, and association areas integrate information and handle higher functions. Damage to different regions produces wildly different deficits.

scaffolds.q: The frontal lobe is located at which part of the brain?
scaffolds.explain: The frontal lobe is at the front of the brain, behind the forehead. The prefrontal cortex is the most anterior (front) part of the frontal lobe — the tip of the spear, evolutionarily speaking.
